data.title: PACSUN CAPTURES FESTIVAL MOMENT WITH CREATOR-LED DESERT ACTIVATIONS
data.description: Pacsun, the youth culture specialty fashion retailer, recently launched its inaugural Influencer Festival House and engaging Roadside Experiences in Los Angeles. This event took place on April 13, 2026. This initiative brought to life the brand's music and fashion elements, solidifying its presence in real-time experiences.

data.title: Sharon AI Announces Accelerated Receipt of Remaining Consideration from Sale of 50% Ownership in Texas Critical Data Centers Joint Venture
data.description: Today, SharonAI Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SHAZ) and its subsidiaries, a prominent Australian neocloud firm, unveiled the expedited reception of the remaining US$50 million Senior Secured Convertible Promissory Note. Additionally, they confirmed receiving a true-up share issuance from New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NASDAQ: NUAI). This accelerated transaction amounts to the total proceeds of the sale from Sharon AI's 50% ownership stake in Texas Critical Data Centers.

data.title: IonQ and University of Maryland Expand QLab Collaboration to Advance Quantum Networking and Research
data.description: In College Park, MD, IonQ (NYSE: IONQ) and the University of Maryland (UMD) disclosed a continued collaboration through the National Quantum Laboratory (QLab), focusing on quantum computing, quantum networking, and workforce development. The partnership extension, valued at $7.5 million, is facilitated by the State of Maryland’s Capital of Quantum Initiative via UMD Eco. This effort underscores a multi-year commitment to advancements in quantum technologies and enhancing the quantum ecosystem.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics (HOTH) Reports Positive HT-VA CRADA Data: GDNF Reprograms Liver Fat Metabolism, Shuts Down Fat-Creation Gene and Activates Fat-Burning Pathways, Outperforming Semaglutide
data.description: A significant decrease in Srebf1, responsible for fat production, and an increase in Pparα, linked to fat metabolism, showcase GDNF as a promising treatment for MAFLD and obesity. The findings position GDNF as a cutting-edge therapy. Hoth Therapeutics, Inc., a leading biopharmaceutical firm, disclosed these promising results. The study was conducted in New York, as reported on April 13, 2026. Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ as HOTH and is currently in the clinical trial phase, demonstrating substantial progress in the field.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Issues Statement Regarding Diana Shipping’s Letter to Shareholders
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE:GNK), the leading U.S.-based drybulk shipowner dedicated to global commodity transportation, responded to Diana Shipping Inc.'s letter directed at Genco shareholders.

data.title: Master Electronics Named a 2026 Top Workplaces Award Winner
data.description: Master Electronics, a prominent distributor of electronic components, has recently been recognized as a recipient of the 2026 Top Workplaces Award in Phoenix. This accolade celebrates companies that prioritize their employees, fostering environments that promote a sense of value and motivation for success. The award selection is determined solely by feedback from employees, gathered through a confidential survey focused on engagement. This survey evaluates various aspects of workplace culture, such as alignment, execution, and overall satisfaction.

data.title: /UPDATE -- Rand McNally Publishing/
data.description: The 2027 edition of the Rand McNally Road Atlas is being introduced today, focusing on 'Destination Dupes' and the excitement of unplanned road trips. This update was announced on 13-Apr-2026 by Rand McNally Publishing through PR Newswire. The new edition offers revised information and enhancements that cater to road enthusiasts.
DPRK TEST FIRES CRUISE MISSILES AND ANTI-WARSHIP MISSILES FROM NAVAL DESTROYER

data.title: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited Announces Additional Contribution to Trust Account to Extend Business Combination Period
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) deposited $12,203.33 into its Trust Account to extend the deadline for a business combination by one month, from April 13, 2026, to May 13, 2026. This move is aimed at granting the Company more time to finalize a potential merger or acquisition.

data.title: Buffalo Services and Gaubert Oil Sign Letter of Intent
data.description: In an announcement made on April 13, 2026, Gaubert Oil Company LLC revealed its plan to acquire the Wholesale and Transportation division of Buffalo Services, Inc. This significant move signifies a strategic consolidation between the two enterprises known for their emphasis on quality products and services. The transaction is outlined in a formal Letter of Intent, solidifying the impending acquisition. Thibodaux, La., and McComb, Miss., are the key locations associated with this business development.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Warns Iran As Strait Of Hormuz Blockade Begins; Broadcom, Bloom, Sandisk Are Big Winners
data.description: President Trump has issued a warning to Iran regarding the U.S. blockade at the Strait of Hormuz, prompting a surge in Sandisk stocks to record levels. Dow Jones Futures reflect this development, with Sandisk leading as a successful investment. Other notable companies benefitting include Broadcom and Bloom. The potential implications of the blockade on the global economy remain a topic of interest amidst the market fluctuations.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Pops As Trump Says This On Iran; Cathie Wood Loads Up On Palantir Shares (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw an increase on the stock market following remarks made by President Trump regarding Iran. Oracle experienced a significant surge in its stock value, while Palantir also saw gains after influential investor Cathie Wood purchased shares in the company. This information was shared in a live coverage article titled "Stock Market Today: Dow Pops As Trump Says This On Iran; Cathie Wood Loads Up On Palantir Shares."

data.title: Lauren Sánchez Bezos, part of a powerful duo, inspires the ultra-rich to embrace happiness and shed apologies.
data.description: Mrs. Sánchez Bezos, one half of a remarkably influential couple, appears to have encouraged billionaires to eschew apologies and instead embrace a life of pleasure and luxury.

data.title: FAST Remodeler Live, the Industry’s Premier Tech Event, Heads to Nashville May 12–13
data.description: Mark your calendars as FAST Remodeler Live, the premier technology-focused conference for remodelers and home improvement professionals, is set to make a return on May 12–13, 2026, at the Grand Hyatt Nashville. Presented by Qualified Remodeler, this event will showcase a keynote speech by renowned author and business strategist Marcus Sheridan. Sheridan will delve into the necessity for entrepreneurs to evolve their marketing approaches to stay relevant in a landscape dominated by artificial intelligence.

data.title: C3 Oilfield Services Adds Industry Veteran Trey Clark as Chief Executive Officer, Appoints Trey Clark and Brad Juneau to Board of Directors
data.description: C3 Oilfield Services, based in Houston, has appointed Trey Clark, an industry veteran, as its new Chief Executive Officer. In addition, both Trey Clark and Brad Juneau have been named to the company's Board of Directors. This move comes as the company aims to strengthen its leadership team with experienced professionals.

data.title: Atlas Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) has shared plans to release its first quarter 2026 earnings after market close on Monday, May 4, 2026. The company will conduct a conference call at 9:00am Central Time (10:00am Eastern Time) on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, to discuss financial and operational results. A live webcast can be accessed at https://ir.atlas.energy/. Interested individuals are advised to join the webcast at least 10 minutes before the scheduled start time.

data.title: Kazia Therapeutics Expands Oncology Platform with First-in-Class SETDB1 Inhibitor Drug Development Platform
data.description: In Sydney, Australia on April 13, 2026, Kazia Therapeutics Limited, listed on Nasdaq as KZIA, revealed that they have obtained the rights to a groundbreaking SETDB1-targeted epigenetic drug. Kazia, a company concentrated on oncology treatments and overcoming treatment resistance, has taken steps towards reprogramming cancer biology. This move signifies a significant advancement in their clinical-stage pursuits.

data.title: Bloom Energy and Oracle Expand Strategic Partnership to Deploy up to 2.8 GW to Accelerate AI Infrastructure Build-Out
data.description: In San Jose, California, Bloom Energy has disclosed a new collaboration with Oracle to bolster the development of its AI and cloud computing infrastructure. This partnership entails Oracle acquiring potentially 2.8 gigawatts (GW) of Bloom's fuel cell systems, with an initial contract for 1.2 GW already in progress. Deployment of these fuel cells has commenced and is expected to proceed throughout the upcoming year, marking a significant step forward in their joint efforts.

data.title: Omnicell to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28, 2026
data.description: Omnicell, a company based in Fort Worth, Texas, will be announcing their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 28th. This report will provide insights into the company's performance and financial standing during the initial months of the year. Investors and analysts will eagerly await this release to assess Omnicell's progress and potential growth. This update is crucial for stakeholders as it will reveal key figures regarding revenue, profit, and other financial metrics, influencing market perceptions and stock price movements.

data.title: Chevron Consolidates Venezuela Heavy Oil Position in Asset Swap
data.description: In Houston today, Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) revealed a significant asset swap deal with Petroleos de Venezuela, S. A. (“PDVSA”) and its subsidiaries. This arrangement will see Chevron's subsidiaries in Venezuela acquiring a 13.21% working interest in the Petroindependencia, S.A. joint venture. This will boost Chevron's total stake in the venture, strengthening their strategic assets in the country. The move aims to enhance operational focus and coordination among all parties involved, while streamlining their investments for mutual benefit.
